sentiment.reasoning: The CSO addressing investor concerns suggests an attempt to mitigate negative sentiment, but the underlying concerns are not resolved by the letter itself, leading to high uncertainty.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
